html.description: Defines the HTML content of the email template, supporting inline CSS and must be valid HTML.

name.description: Specifies the name of the SES template, must be unique and between 1 and 64 characters.

subject.description: Subject line for the email template, must be a string with a maximum length of 256 characters.

text.description: Content of the email body in plain text format, supporting up to 64 KB in size.
